title: What a $100K Employee Costs Me Now
description: Breaking down how AI agents replaced traditional hiring math. Real numbers from running a one-person operation that outputs like a team.

title: I Saved a Client $5K/Year on AWS in 2 Hours
description: A real client engagement where AI agents audited an AWS account, found $5K in annual waste, and produced a remediation plan in a single afternoon.

title: Why My AI OS Survived Anthropic's Harness Lockdown
description: Anthropic cut off third-party harness access to Claude Code subscriptions. My custom AI agent setup kept running. Here's why the architecture held up, and where it's still vulnerable.

title: Agent Specialists Changed How I Build Software
description: How I stopped treating AI as one generic assistant and started building specialized agents for different parts of the development lifecycle.

title: Why Assembling Freelancers Kills Web Projects
description: The hidden cost of piecing together freelancers for web projects. Why a single engineer with AI agents delivers better results than a team of specialists who don't talk to each other.

title: Software Engineers Got Disrupted First
description: Everyone's talking about AI replacing jobs. They're missing the real story: software engineers were the first profession to get fundamentally restructured, and most of us are better for it.

title: One Week with Claude Code: Building an AI-Powered Publishing Pipeline
description: After seven days of building with Claude Code and my AI assistant Gus, I shipped an end-to-end blog pipeline, an SEO auditor, and a chatbot — most of it while cleaning my office.
